basic_details.job_title: CESCOM Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 200 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Chamundeshwari Electricity Supply Corporation Limited (CESC), Mysore
basic_details.short_information: Chamundeshwari Electricity Supply Corporation Limited (CESC), Mysore under the Government of Karnataka has published the Apprentice Training Notification 2026 for one-year apprenticeship training under the Apprenticeship (Amendment) Act 1973. Online applications are invited from qualified and eligible Graduates, Non-Engineering Graduates, and Diploma holders who have passed out in the years 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025 & 2026 and belong to Karnataka State. A total of 200 apprenticeship positions are available across Engineering Graduate, Technician (Diploma), and Non-Engineering categories. The trai

important_dates.document verification at cesc corporate: Any working day between 15.06.2026 to 19.06.2026 (11:00 AM to 4:00 PM)

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the following eligibility conditions: | Requisite Qualification: | Graduate Apprentices: BE/B.Tech in relevant branch from AICTE/State/Central Govt. recognized University/Institution. Technician (Diploma) Apprentices: 3-year Diploma in relevant branch from recognized Polytechnic. Non-Engineering Graduates: BA / B.Sc / B.Com / BBA / BCA from recognized University. | Other Eligibility Conditions: | Candidates must have passed in 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025 or 2026. Minimum passing marks required. Candidates who have already undergone or are currently undergoing apprenticeship training or have one year work experience are not eligible. Age: Not less than 18 years (as per Apprenticeship Rules). Candidates should have knowledge of reading and writing in Kannada language. Only Karnataka State candidates are eligible. | Reservation Policy | Reservation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD will be followed as per Apprentices Act guidelines. Category claimed at the time of online application will only be considered. Relevant certificates must be produced at document verification.

selection_process: Board of Apprenticeship Training (Southern Region) will shortlist candidates based on marks secured in the qualifying examination. Shortlisted candidates will be informed via registered email and must appear in person for document verification at CESC Corporate Office
how_to_apply: Candidates must register/enroll on the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS) Portal and apply against CESC vacancies.
Search “Chamundeshwari Electricity Supply Corporation Limited” and apply.
Complete profile and generate 12-digit Enrollment Number.
Document Verification: Shortlisted candidates to appear with all original documents at CESC Corporate Office, Mysuru between 15.06.2026 to 19.06.2026.
important_instructions: Incomplete or late applications will be rejected. No TA/DA or boarding/lodging will be provided. Completion of training does not guarantee employment. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature. CESC reserves the right to cancel the notification at any stage. Candidates must provide valid email ID and mobile number for all future communications.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CESCOM Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for CESCOM Apprentice Recruitment 2026 through the NATS Portal is 29 May 2026. Candidates belonging to Karnataka State who meet the eligibility conditions should complete their registration and application process before the deadline. Applications submitted after the closing date will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in CESCOM Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Chamundeshwari Electricity Supply Corporation Limited (CESC), Mysore has announced a total of 200 apprenticeship positions for the training year 2026-27. These vacancies are distributed among Engineering Graduate Apprentices, Diploma Apprentices, and Non-Engineering Graduate Apprentices. Candidates from multiple educational backgrounds can apply for the available posts.

faq.question: Q3. What qualifications are required for CESCOM Apprentice Training 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for Graduate Apprentice posts must possess BE/B.Tech degrees in relevant branches, while Diploma Apprentice applicants should hold a 3-year Diploma from a recognized polytechnic. Non-Engineering categories require qualifications such as B.A, B.Sc, B.Com, BBA, or BCA from recognized universities. Only candidates who passed in 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025, or 2026 are eligible.

faq.question: Q4. What stipend is offered under CESCOM Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Graduate and Non-Engineering Apprentices selected under CESCOM Recruitment 2026 will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 12,300/-. Diploma Apprentices will receive Rs. 10,900/- per month during the one-year training period. The stipend will be paid according to Apprenticeship Act rules and applicable guidelines.

faq.question: Q5. Who is eligible to apply for CESCOM Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Only candidates belonging to Karnataka State are eligible to apply for CESCOM Apprentice Training 2026. Applicants must be at least 18 years old and should possess knowledge of reading and writing Kannada language. Candidates who already completed apprenticeship training or have one year of work experience are not eligible for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for CESCOM Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The Board of Apprenticeship Training (Southern Region) will shortlist candidates based on marks obtained in the qualifying examination. Shortlisted applicants will be informed through registered email IDs and called for document verification at the CESC Corporate Office, Mysuru. Final selection will be subject to successful verification of original documents.

faq.question: Q7. How can candidates apply for CESCOM Apprentice Training 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must first register on the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS) Portal and complete their profile details. After registration, applicants should search for “Chamundeshwari Electricity Supply Corporation Limited” and apply for the apprenticeship vacancies. New users must generate a valid 12-digit Enrollment Number before submitting the application.

faq.question: Q8. When will CESCOM Apprentice document verification be conducted?
faq.answer: Document verification for shortlisted candidates will be conducted at the CESC Corporate Office, Mysuru from 15 June 2026 to 19 June 2026. Candidates must appear in person between 11:00 AM and 4:00 PM along with all original educational, identity, and category-related documents for verification purposes.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any guarantee of permanent job after CESCOM apprenticeship training?
faq.answer: No, completion of apprenticeship training under CESCOM Recruitment 2026 does not guarantee permanent employment in the organization. The apprenticeship program is purely a training opportunity designed to provide practical experience to eligible graduates and diploma holders. Candidates should apply with full understanding of the training-based nature of the engagement.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required for CESCOM Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates shortlisted for verification must produce original educational certificates, mark sheets, identity proof, caste certificates (if applicable), and NATS enrollment details. Applicants should also keep valid email ID and mobile number active throughout the recruitment process for receiving updates and communication from CESCOM authorities.
